data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow for high-value bookings. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this approval workflow, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an approval workflow, but there is no evidence that this functionality has been implemented or tested, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of approval workflow for high-value bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for approval workflow
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the approval workflow for high-value bookings.
